options.name: <formatString>
options.description: Format specifiers like sprintf or Tcl's format command. (string, optional) <args <arg1> <arg2> ...> # The fomat args value to print.

options.name: -error
options.description: The message is an error. A prefix will be added.

options.name: -warning
options.description: The message is an warning. A prefix will be added.
